item.title: Quotable quotes.
item.description:
He was always a right-of-center guy, but his work was usually amusing and insightful.
See also, Oscar Wilde: There are only two tragedies in life: one is not getting what one wants, and the other is getting it.
There's hot stew, you say?
Anyone know the current price? It's been 45 years since I dropped a tab.
Doesn't really belong here, but I find it hilarious.
Henry Miller
item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: A statue of the late civil rights leader John Lewis was installed in Decatur, Georgia (replacing a 110yr old Confederate statue that stood on the very same spot)
item.description: The large bronze statue of civil rights icon and Georgia congressman John Lewis was installed Friday, at the very spot where a contentious monument to the confederacy stood for more than 110 years in the town square before it was dismantled in 2020 (it was among other Confederate symbols that became flashpoints of protest during the unrest sparked by George Floyd's murder).
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Memes and stuff
item.description:
"I can see his stuffing!!!"
That is the chaotic vibe I strive for.
Those good brain chemicals are elusive, but addictive.
I need any of those.
Found out that I'm a "brat" recently. I would say that I'm leaning in to it, but I kinda already there.
Me, yesterday. Over stimmed and in need of a blankie.
Is it bad that if I got a cup that said that I'd go "awwwww, thank you!!!"
Switch the beginning letters of things
Ahhhh
Bed too comfy to do laundry.....
I hooked up with a trans girl the other day. She was nice. She said she was a dom. She had me wimpering quite a bit. I did have her melted into a puddle several times in those 7 hours tho.
Interactions like this are why I have the urge to be a mom, then I come to my senses.
Look, everyone likes being spanked. I just like being spanked and call bad names.
Maybe I should get tested for autism, it's been suggested by several people now.
Oh yeah, that trans girl was a decade younger than me. Not sure how to feel about that. Her boobs were bigger than mine too!!!!
I'm living for my niece, she needs someone to help her torture my sister when she's a teen.
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex

item.title: Imgur is fantastic
item.description: I hope they don't let it get over run by conservative bots like everyplace else in a short sighted goal to drive activity or something. Edit: To be clear I like the politics. It's nice to be in a place where I can just be and people are nice and/or don't really care. The people that complain about the politics are the ones who don't like a space where they can't be openly racist, sexist, phobes, and Trump supporters. I'm a trans woman and this is about the only place where that's acceptable, which isn't a place specifically for trans people.
item.dc:creator: jrpsmith

item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: Lanzarote - Spanish Volcanic Soil Wine
item.description:
Lanzarote, a Spanish island off the coast of North Africa and formed from volcanic eruptions 15 million years ago, is covered in solidified lava flows, volcanic rocks, and black sand. It receives minimal rainfall, about 16 days a year, and temperatures on its black plains can reach up to 50°C (120°F).
Despite these harsh conditions, Lanzarote produces 400,000 to 600,000 bottles of wine annually. The island's winemakers, considered some of the hardest working in the world, developed innovative cultivation techniques in the 18th century.
The last eruption of the Timanfaya Volcano in 1730, which lasted six years, forced many residents to emigrate. However, those who stayed discovered that the volcanic soil, known as picón, was excellent at retaining moisture, making it possible to grow crops.
Lanzarote is unique for its method of dry cultivation using volcanic soil, a testament to the resilience and ingenuity of its farmers.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71
